race.comment: ZOURUN RUN (1) was trending the right way before tackling the Belgravia and the Burgess Queen during The Pinnacles. Back with a recent trial win under her belt where she looked to do it easy and she rates highly on her form and SP's last campaign. Can return with a bang. POBLANO (4) looks the main danger after bolting in to break her maiden at Pinjarra before a 0.6L win to end last campaign over 1200m at Ascot. She'll be better for a recent trial where she hit the line nicely under minimal riding and she gets Pike for the return. Can pick up from where she left off. COSMIC ECLIPSE (5) is first-up off a 303-day break here but should be better for a couple of recent trials. Drawn well and was a fresh winner last campaign. Keep safe. FIVE DOWN (6) won't be far away as he comes into this on the fresh side. MAGNACHINE (8) can be in the finish second-up.
